name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command Prompt
notes:
This building block detects an adversary using automated techniques for collecting internal data.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Automated Collection Command Prompt
SIGMA Description: Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command Prompt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [.doc or .docx or .xls or .xlsx or .ppt or .pptx or .rtf or .pdf or .txt]

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?dir\s+.*' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /b %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /s %') OR (LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?findstr\s+.*' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /e %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /si %')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command Prompt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [.doc or .docx or .xls or .xlsx or .ppt or .pptx or .rtf or .pdf or .txt]

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?dir\s+.*' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /b %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /s %') OR (LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?findstr\s+.*' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /e %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /si %')) AQL filter query
